CustomField.description: Defines the naming pattern template for auto-generated Opportunity names. Uses field tokens in the format {!FieldApiName} that are replaced with actual values at runtime. Common tokens include {!Contact.Name}, {!Account.Name}, {!CloseDate}, {!Amount}, and {!RecordType.Name}. For example, "{!Contact.Name} {!Amount} {!CloseDate}" might produce "John Smith $100 2026-01-15". If blank, Opportunity naming automation is not applied for the matching attribution and record types.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Template for auto-generated Opportunity names using {!FieldApiName} tokens, e.g. "{!Contact.Name} {!Amount} {!CloseDate}".
CustomField.label: Opportunity Name Format
